title: heterotheca ruthii
intro: Heterotheca ruthii, also known as the Rocky Mountain heterotheca, is a perennial plant species native to the western United States and Canada. It belongs to the family Asteraceae and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The plant is used to treat various health issues, including wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory problems, due to its potential health benefits such as reducing inflammation and promoting tissue repair. The herbal preparations of Heterotheca ruthii include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used topically or internally to leverage its medicinal properties.
